programme.title: Watson S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Watson takes a major ethical risk when he decides to treat a sickle cell patient with an unorthodox surgery, and the team faces their own dilemma when they must decide whether to look the other way or help the young woman. Meanwhile, Ingrid struggles to get her sister admitted to her spinal project.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 5
programme.desc: Guo Ying asks for the drug investigation documents, but Ying Jie makes an excuse to refuse. Guo Ying realises that Yao Kang was the one who hindered her from getting the documents and confronts him. Yao Kang says he does not want Ying Jie to take the risk, but eventually gives in and hands her the papers. The documents turns out to be fake, causing Guo Ying's investigation to bear no result.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 6
programme.desc: Yu Xuan leads Guo Ying to meet Li Na, and the two trail her secretly. Li Na discovers them but is unable to shake them off her trail. Guo Ying gets hold of her and asks her where Wen Guang is. Li Na pretends to be shocked and seeks help, causing a crowd to form. A car appears and drives off with Li Na. Guo Ying, unable to stop the vehicle, discovers the driver is Wen Guang!

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 11
programme.desc: Wei Ren gets to know from his client that the appointed agency of Mei Hao Yuan is involved in bribing the residents, attracting agents to come on board. Shu Juan receives an anonymous clip that contains the process of how they bribe the residents. Shu Juan discloses the clip, which causes the agency to be part of the investigation, and Wei ren's company will take over the En Bloc project..

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 12
programme.desc: Ting Xuan bumps into Wei Ren after she knocks off from work. Wei Ren gives her a lift. On the way, Wei Ren receives an overseas call from Zi Wei. Zi Wei suspects that her dad may be in danger. Wei Ren rushes to Zi Wei's house and send her dad to the hospital in time. Ting Xuan changes her impression towards Wei Ren. She feels that Wei Ren is someone who values relationships.

programme.title: Bountiful Blessings - EP 17
programme.desc: Morning tries to extract a magical element from Xiao Fei but fails. The Kitchen God appears and takes down Morning. Pin Hong confronts Kitchen God and they duel, but he manages to subdue her and lock her in a small pagado. Fu Yuan immediately throws the pagoda into the lake.

programme.title: Bountiful Blessings - EP 18
programme.desc: Pin Hong captures Fuxi and transform into her likeness. She starts to create trouble for Dong Hai and Dafeng and even causes Er Hu to end up in hospital. Kitchen God is punished and turned into a cockroach. He looks for Xiao Fei and tells her that he is her father. He tells her what Pin Hong has done and asks that she get help from the rest.

The coverage also examines gaps in building maintenance and fire safety, and victims’ hopes for the future.

Because of their father's invention dream, the Chao brother's lives are about to change.

Joko said Rania should not be desperate to commit suicide there.

programme.title: PANJI PETUALANG 911 - EP 11

programme.title: Combo Cinta Calon Istri
programme.desc: Miko (Alzi Markers) meets a popular and beautiful street dangdut singer who boldly accepts all his challenges-including flirting with his older brother. However, Miko becomes confused when he finds himself overwhelmed by love from the woman he initially chose for his brother.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 146
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cek Khodam Cewek Doger Monyet
programme.desc: Rendy (Fendy Chow) and Arum (Soraya Rasyid) argue after Arum insists that her monkey is not chasing Rendy. Feeling exhausted, Rendy gets angry, and they clash. As time passes, they grow closer, and Rendy eventually confesses his feelings for Arum.

programme.title: REBUTAN HATI MISS UNI CORN
programme.desc: NETTY and SARA are two best friends who have been together since childhood. They do everything together. They have the same taste in everything, from matching clothes to being mistaken for sisters. Netty's mother also considers Sara as her own child, especially since Sara is an orphan who lives with her elderly uncle. Sara's uncle owns a corn farm that supplies corn for grilling at the peak. Meanwhile, Netty's mother runs an Indomie noodle stall, where Netty also works.

programme.desc: Tama (Mahdy Reza) rushes to work for an important meeting, fearing he will lose his job if he is absent. Suddenly, while crossing the street, he is hit by a car driven by a beautiful doctor named Serina (Rachquel Nesia).

programme.title: REBUT PACAR SAHABAT? ASIAAAAP!
programme.desc: Ara (Debi Sagita) is about to get married, but suddenly her best friend faints because she doesn't want Ara to marry her dream guy, Joni (Aditya Suryo). In the end, because she loves her best friend, Ara runs away to Sam's (Fauzan Nasrul) car. Ara is the daughter of a poor widow who works as a maid. She tries to steal her best friend's boyfriend, who is also the son of her mother's employer, using all sorts of funny methods, and eventually tries to reunite them.

programme.title: Warteg Bintang Lima Tapi Kamu Yang Utama
programme.desc: Babe Ali’s daughter (Ersya Aurelia) runs a small warteg (local food stall) business offering a cheap promotion: three side dishes with rice for only Rp20,000. She often clashes with a wealthy "mama’s boy" (Kevin Hillers) who mocks her tomboyish nature and her overenthusiastic way of running the business. However, their frequent arguments turn into mutual affection, even though her father warns her to stay away from him.

programme.title: Dihadapan Ikan Semua Cintamu Menyala Abangkuh
programme.desc: berkisah tentang seorang gadis cantik bernama Gina. Diceritakan kalau Gina sangat syok, karena mendadak dia ditagih utang oleh rentenir, sementara mamaknya pun kabur, karena tidak sanggup membayar hutang. Pada akhirnya Gina mengunjungi kakeknya, yang memiliki usaha ikan. Di sana Gina pun bekerja keras. Namun ternyata Gina bertemu dengan cowok resek bernama Bagas. Di sana, Bagas terus saja mengolok-olok Gina

programme.title: Jeena Sirf Merre Liye
programme.desc: Childhood friends Pooja and Karan separate when she moves cities. Years later, they reunite unknowingly, missing each other while searching for the same lost bond again. Release Year: 2002 Director: Talat Jani

programme.title: Singh Is King
programme.desc: A comic caper about Happy Singh, a Punjabi villager who goes through a series of misadventures and eventually becomes the King of the Australian underworld. 2008 Release Year: 2008 Director: Anees Bazmee Awards: 9 wins and 12 nominations

programme.title: Pardes
programme.desc: Kishorilal plans his NRI son's wedding to Ganga, but her bond with foster son Arjun sparks conflict, forcing the family to face love over tradition. Release Year: 1997 Director: Subhash Ghai Awards: 1998 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Playback Singer- Female- Alka Yagnik, 1998 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Debut ActreSS- Mahima Chaudhry, 1998 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Screenplay- Subhash Ghai

programme.title: Gadar 2
programme.desc: When Tara Singh vanishes during a battle and is believed captured, his son Jeete risks everything to rescue him, facing deadly dangers to bring his father home. Release Year: 2023 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Koi Mil Gaya
programme.desc: Rohit, a mentally challenged youth, forms a bond with a gentle alien, and when police hunt it down, he risks everything to protect his only true friend from being taken away. Release Year: 2003 Director: Rakesh Roshan

programme.title: Nill Battey Sannata
programme.desc: A strong-willed mother pushes her daughter to chase her dreams, guiding her through setbacks, self-doubt, and hope as their bond grows stronger through every challenge. Release Year: 2015 Director: Ashwiny Iyer Tiwari

programme.title: Table No. 21
programme.desc: A couple is thrilled to participate in a game show with a huge cash prize, until they find out that the questions ironically tie back to an important chapter of their lives and that the only way to survive is to complete the game. Release Year: 2013 Director: Aditya Datt Awards: 2 nominations

programme.title: Go Goa Gone
programme.desc: Friends seeking thrill at a Goa rave reach a deserted island, only to face a terrifying zombie outbreak that turns their party into a desperate fight to stay alive. Release Year: 2013 Director: Raj and D.K. Awards: 2013 Winner ASIN Award- Best Cinematographer- Dan Macarthur

programme.title: Despatch
programme.desc: Veteran crime journalist Joy feels outdated in a hyper-digital world. Chasing a fresh story, he uncovers buried truths that challenge power, media ethics, and his conscience deeply forever. Release Year: 2024 Director: Kanu Behl.

programme.title: Love, Sitara
programme.desc: Sitara, who avoided marriage all her life, suddenly proposes to Arjun, shocking her family in Kerala and uncovering secrets that change everything they believed. Release Year: 2024 Director: Vandana Kataria

programme.title: Nill Battey Sannata
programme.desc: A strong-willed mother pushes her daughter to chase her dreams, guiding her through setbacks, self-doubt, and hope as their bond grows stronger through every challenge. Release Year: 2015 Director: Ashwiny Iyer Tiwari

programme.title: Baa Baaa Black Sheep
programme.desc: Baa Baaa Black Sheep is a 2018 Indian action comedy film, starring Anupam Kher, Manish Paul, Annu Kapoor, Manjari Phadnis and Kay Kay Menon in a lead roles. Release Year: 2018 Director: Vishwas Paandya

programme.title: Ek Aur Ek Gyarah
programme.desc: Two small-time thieves are forced into kidnapping a child to save someone they love, facing fear, guilt, and a desperate race to find a way out without harming anyone. Release Year: 2003 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: In rural India, an honest police officer takes on brutal caste crimes, risking his life and career as he challenges corruption, violence, and deep-rooted injustice. Release Year: 2019 Director: Anubhav Sinha Awards: Best Director Critics- Anubhav Sinha, Best Actor Critics- Ayushmann Khurrana

programme.title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega
programme.desc: Raj, Pooja and Jhanvi are in a complicated love triangle. Pooja and Jhanvi love Raj. Raj loves Jhanvi but is misunderstood as Pooja's husband by their family. How will the confusion clear off?

programme.title: Chhorii 2
programme.desc: When a supernatural cult abducts her seven-year-old daughter, Sakshi must rescue her, while fighting the deep-rooted societal injustices that continue to haunt her and the young woman around her

programme.title: Driver Jamuna
programme.desc: A young female who drives a cab for living lands into trouble when three contract killers ask her to give them a ride. She must find a way to escape the danger.

programme.title: Justice Choudhary
programme.desc: Justice Chowdhary gives up his moral values and determines to seek revenge after his entire family is abducted and killed in his presence.

programme.title: Ek Ladki Ko Dekha Toh Aisa Laga
programme.desc: A young woman must contend with a family that wants her to get married, a writer who is completely smitten with her, and a secret that she harbors close to her heart.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: Kantara
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Saiyaara
programme.desc: Passionate lovers navigate a rollercoaster romance, facing euphoric highs and crushing lows while desperately clinging to their tumultuous bond.

programme.desc: A heartbroken writer struggling with writer's block goes to a hill station where he finds love again but uncovers a copycat serial killer who has mysteriously come alive.

programme.desc: A newly married couple's relationship and reputation are put at risk when their CD is stolen. The story follows their roller coaster journey to recover the CD.

programme.desc: Rebellious teenage Binny and her conservative grandfather from Bihar connect after a dramatic incident. Can the contrasting personalities bridge generational gaps and impact each other's lives?

programme.desc: Rooh Baba steps into a spooky estate and faces two mysterious spirit, both claiming to be Manjulika.

programme.desc: Sanjana and Aditya go to Ooty for a holiday to save their unsteady marriage. However, Sanjana is haunted by a spirit who reveals some dark secrets about Aditya and his past.

programme.desc: A young woman breaks up with her boyfriend when she learns he does not believe in true love, but her next boyfriend is not a perfect match either.

programme.title: Littoral - EP 14
programme.desc: In Guerande's salt marshes ''paludiere'', the feminine form of ''paludier'' or salt worker, long-referred to the salt worker's wife, with no professional status. Today 15% of ''paludieres'' run their own salt business. Dominique, Veronique and Morgane recount how their place in a still predominantly masculine profession, changed over the years.

Determined to keep a promise made to his wife years earlier, he has to take part in a contemporary dance creation, but without letting the family know.

programme.title: 47 Pouces

programme.title: Movie - Vaale
programme.desc: Deva, a man with a hearing and speech impairment, secretly loves his twin brother's wife, Priya. He tries his best to separate the two, to the extent of following them on their honeymoon.

programme.title: Movie - Paattondru Ketten
programme.desc: Sneha, an orphan, leads a happy life after marrying Anandh. However, her past relationship with a smuggler comes back to haunt her and threatens to ruin her marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Uyarnthavan
programme.desc: This film is directed by Ashokram, and stars Ramki and Shanthipriya in the lead roles, with music by Gangai Amaran.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Rhythm
programme.desc: Karthikeyan, a photo editor in Mumbai, is a widower whose parents wish to see him settled and happy. Chitra, a widow with a son, gives them hope, unaware that their pasts are intertwined.

programme.title: Movie - Maayan
programme.desc: Maayan cannot bear the sufferings of his villagers at the hands of the feudal lords of pre-independence India. He turns into a messiah of the downtrodden and the worst enemy of the rich and wealthy.

programme.title: Movie - Lovely
programme.desc: Mahadevan hates the word love. His daughter Nivedha, however, loves Chandru, son of her father's business partner. Thus begins a fun-filled attempt by Chandru to try and impress Mahadevan.

programme.title: Movie - Raja Kaiya Vecha
programme.desc: Raja pretends to be a cop in order to impress the woman he loves, and she dumps him on learning the truth. When they meet again, he has a good job, but there is someone else who is in love with him.

programme.title: Movie - Murattu Kaalai
programme.desc: Although Kaalaiyan and his brothers can afford a luxurious lifestyle, they choose to live modestly. However, Sundaravelu is a devious man who tries to grab their land.

programme.title: Movie - Aayudham
programme.desc: Siva, a medical college student, falls in love with his classmate Mahalakshmi. Trouble begins when he fights against a gangster who also falls in love with Mahalakshmi.

programme.title: Movie - Penn Puthi Munn Puthi
programme.desc: A woman stops the wedding of a happy-go-lucky man and tells him that she is trying to save his innocent parents who are in prison.

programme.title: Movie - Neelakuyil
programme.desc: Muthusamy, a poor vagabond, falls in love with Shalini, a blind flower seller, and works hard to afford a surgery to restore her eyesight. However, circumstances change drastically for both of them.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Uttama Purushan
programme.desc: Raghu, a married man, tries to have an extra-marital affair with his secretary and asks her to come to a hotel room. However, he gets accused of murdering a woman who stayed in the neighbouring room.

programme.title: Movie - Oru Malarin Payanam
programme.desc: Nandhini and Sudha are devoted sisters. Sudha is overdependent on Nandhini. Nandhini wants Murthy, an employee in her company, to marry Sudha but he politely declines, citing a conflict in status.

programme.title: Movie - Vidukathai
programme.desc: Anandhi is raised by her father who is a fearless man. Neelakandan, a 40-year-old bachelor who is a tenant, becomes the only comforting factor when her father dies.

programme.title: Movie - Varna Jalam
programme.desc: Daniel, a young man, wins over the heart of retired IPS officer Devanathan and his family. Soon, Daniel puts his plan into action which threatens to destroy their family.

programme.title: Movie - Pottu Amman
programme.desc: A black magician kills 27 babies, each born under a different star, to attain extraordinary powers. However, he realises that he has to kill one more baby, born under a rare star, to become omnipotent. Pottu Amman comes to rescue the baby from the black magician.

programme.title: PL ePREMIER LEAGUE 2025/26 - GRAND FINALS (Live)
programme.desc: Join us for coverage of the grand final of the 2026 ePremier League.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 43
programme.desc: We join Willian in Gremio, Brazil, where he is currently continuing his playing career, as he reflects on an incredible journey in the Premier League. Sharing insights from his time at Chelsea and that controversial move across London to Arsenal and then Fulham, Willian opens up about the highs, challenges and defining moments that shaped his career at the top level of English football.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2024/2025 (GB: SALAH)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 24/25 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 24
programme.desc: We head to London to unveil the two newest inductee's into the Premier League Hall of fame. Hosted by Kelly Cates, and with a who's who of footballing royalty in attendance, we go behind the curtain to give you exclusive access to the hottest ticket in town.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 26
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the first of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Eden Hazard. A celebrated footballer who lit up the English top-flight during his illustrious career; a winner of multiple domestic and European honours, he became a true legend of the Premier League era. He reflects on his rise to the top, the moments that defined his career, and the immense pride he feels at joining the elite ranks of the Premier League's greatest ever players.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 27
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. From his journey from Class of '92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon, he talks us through the moments that defined his legacy at Manchester United. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 05 JAN
programme.desc: We look back at all the goals and key action from a bumper Matchweek 20 in the Premier League, including City against Chelsea, Leeds v Man Utd, and leaders Arsenal's trip to Bournemouth.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 1
programme.desc: Once the unsung workhorses of English football, centre-backs have become some of the Premier League's most influential figures. This week, The Art of... sits down with two-time Premier League winner Joleon Lescott to explore how the role has evolved from last-ditch defending to a position that now shapes games, systems and titles. Joleon breaks down some of the key attributes of the role, and examines how the duties of the centre-back have expanded over time.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 2
programme.desc: Legendary goalkeeper, Petr Cech, sits down with Will Perry to discuss the role of the goalkeeper in the Premier League and how it has changed over the years. Cech gives his unique insight into the mentality of a goalkeeper and reflects on his career before breaking down and analysing some of the key attributes that make a great goalkeeper. He also selects five iconic Premier League goalkeepers to build his dream keeper for the modern game.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 2
programme.desc: Will Perry is joined by Freddie Ljungberg to analyse and discuss the evolution of wingers down the years, and deep dive into what makes the perfect wideplayer.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 20
programme.desc: This week's Big Interview sees two of Chelsea's biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. Considered one of the most technically gifted players the Premier League has ever seen, Gianfranco Zola visits the Chelsea training ground to talk to the man currently lighting up the Premier League, Cole Palmer, about various aspects of his game.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 9
programme.desc: Since joining Liverpool in 2023, Cody Gakpo has become a key figure at Anfield - playing a major role in their Premier League title win last season. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Netherlands international to learn about his rise, at the PSV academy from the age of six, to winning one of football's biggest prizes.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2024/2025 (LIV)
programme.desc: Relive another extraordinary Premier League campaign as Liverpool soared to an historic 20th league title, Nottingham Forest defied expectations and the promoted sides were strenuously challenged. There were also tactical transformations, shifts in narrative trends, and a more open field than ever before. Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 33
programme.desc: With 87 goals to his name Danny Welbeck is the fifth-highest goalscorer among active Premier League players, and across a career spanning 17 seasons he has seen it all. This week, the Brighton striker sits down with former teammate Owen Hargreaves to reflect on his remarkable journey. From his early days at Manchester United and being crowned champion in 2013, to his move to Arsenal where he overcame adversity, and now to his current role thriving as a leader for the Seagulls.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 43
programme.desc: We join Willian in Gremio, Brazil, where he is currently continuing his playing career, as he reflects on an incredible journey in the Premier League. Sharing insights from his time at Chelsea and that controversial move across London to Arsenal and then Fulham, Willian opens up about the highs, challenges and defining moments that shaped his career at the top level of English football.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2014/2015 (GB: AGUERO)
programme.desc: We take a look back at some of the most spectacular and important goals from previous Premier League seasons.

programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Considered a legend at Stamford Bridge, John Terry won no fewer than five League titles at Chelsea as well as lifting the F.A. Cup five times and the Champions League trophy. We find out what set him apart from his peers and where he rates amongst the very best in the World.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: With 6 Premier League titles to his name, Rio Ferdinand is widely regarded as one of the best defenders to have played in the League. We sit down with the Englishman to discuss the moments that made him a legend and helped him rightly earn his place in the Premier League Hall of Fame.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 30
programme.desc: Three decades on from Manchester United's iconic Class of '92, PL Stories steps beyond the headline names to rediscover the teammates who shared the same dressing room, dreams, and demands of one of football's most revered youth systems. We sit down with the lesser-known graduates who lived that journey first-hand, players whose paths diverged from the global spotlight but whose experiences offer a rare and revealing window into the reality behind the legend.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 36
programme.desc: In the heart of Ecuador, we sit down with Antonio Valencia as he reflects on an extraordinary journey from humble beginnings to the grand stages of world football. Against the backdrop of the streets and stadiums that shaped him, he recounts his rise through adversity, his explosive emergence in the Premier League with Wigan, and his evolution into a title-winning, Champions League-chasing leader at Manchester United.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2012/2013 (MNU)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2012/2013 (GB:RVP)
programme.desc: We take a look back at some of the most spectacular and important goals from previous Premier League seasons.

programme.title: PL 100 - ROBIN VAN PERSIE
programme.desc: Premier League 100, celebrates some of the leading names to have achieved iconic milestones within England's top flight. From scoring over 100 goals, to making over 100 clean sheets, we speak to the legends that left their mark and reflect on the goals and saves that set them apart from their rivals

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2011/2012 season.

programme.title: REVIEW - FRI 09 JAN
programme.desc: The Review show wraps up every match and every goal from the final round of a busy festive period, which culminates in Arsenal against Liverpool.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 18
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the best teams in Premier League history, we speak to the players who formed part of the Arsenal Invincibles of the 2003-04 season and hear about the behind the scenes stories and funny anecdotes from that unforgettable league win. With contributions from Thierry Henry, Patrick Vieira, Dennis Bergkamp, Freddie Ljungberg, Ray Parlour and Martin Keown.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 43
programme.desc: We join Willian in Gremio, Brazil, where he is currently continuing his playing career, as he reflects on an incredible journey in the Premier League. Sharing insights from his time at Chelsea and that controversial move across London to Arsenal and then Fulham, Willian opens up about the highs, challenges and defining moments that shaped his career at the top level of English football.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 5
programme.desc: Leicester City's Premier League triumph is one of the greatest underdog stories in the history of sport. Wes Morgan and Marc Albrighton recount the pivotal moments that defined their remarkable journey to the title.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 17
programme.desc: A tale of two seasons - Gary Cahill recalls the Chelsea championship campaigns of 2014/15 under Jose Mourinho, and 2016/17 with Antonio Conte at the helm.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2016/2017 (CHE)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Tshilumba Mikixi vs. August Kayambala
programme.desc: In this episode Tshilomba 'The Old Monkey' Mikixi takes on August 'The Barista' Kayambala in a lightweight clash.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Joe Calzaghe vs Roy Jones Jr.
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a light heavyweight championship match between Joe Calzaghe (45-0, 32 KOs) and Roy Jones Jr. (52-4, 38 KOs) from Madison Square Garden in New York City, New York, USA, on November 8, 2008.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Forms as well as Boy's Weapons and Men's Traditional Forms.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Gennady Golovkin vs. Grzergorz Proksa
programme.desc: This episode features middleweight champion Gennady Golovkin defending against and dominating Grzergorz Proska, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Travis Walker vs. Chris Arreola
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle among heavyweights as Travis Walker faces the then-undefeated Chris Arreola, who was ranked in the top 10 by four of the boxing organizations. While the fight seems to go to one side after the opening bell, the momentum quickly shifts.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams I
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features middleweights Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (44-1, 24 KOs) vs. Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (37-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on December 5, 2009. The result was a controversial majority decision, and the two would eventually square off in a rematch about a year later.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Michael Katsidis
programme.desc: This episode features lightweight champion Juan Manuel Marquez defending against Michael Katsidis, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Hohhot Grand Prix, and stop to get to know the world's #1 ranked fighter Aleksandar Kukolj. We then head to Russia to witness the effect that Judo has on the Russian people.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs Orlando Lora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman facing off with Orlando Lora. A left hook and right uppercut combination ends this fight. Also on the card, action from former heavyweight champion James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. programme.title: WCCB Tim Tszyu vs. Sebastian Fundora
programme.desc: From the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, undefeated Super Welterweight World Champion Tim Tszyu travels from Australia to defend his title against former World Champion Sebastian Fundora. Fundora stands 6'5", and is known for his all-action and exciting style. He replaces an injured Keith Thurman, and jumps into a World Title match-up against one of boxing's rising stars in Tszyu.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 5: Marseille, France - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Savate and the Martial Art of Hands and Feet with Masters Christian Robert, Frank May, Frederic Baret, Laurent Bois and Patrick Gellat.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Sergio Mora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing off with Sergio Mora with a highly disputed and controversial decision you will have to see to believe! The two never had a rematch. Also on the card, action from WBC Super Welterweight champ Jermell Charlo.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 20
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 1
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 86
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go 'this way, that way' on a Tubby Car journey to the Hidey Hup. The Tubby Spinny goes 'this way, that way' too.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and say "Hello".

programme.title: Pop Paper City (S1) - EP 30
programme.desc: The friends travel into outer space to visit Planet Popbeam. Mae-Mae wonders if the planet is made of cheese, but Phoebe thinks it's made of rock.

programme.title: Dog Loves Books (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: Dog and Pug are on a building site and they meet three Diggers - Big Digger, Bigger Digger and Tiny. The two big diggers look down on Tiny but she is the one who wants to do all the work.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy has a pair of yummy green socks waiting for him. He eats one, but where is the second? He visits OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Messy monster is having breakfast and sees little objects on the fridge. Why don't they fall off? He goes to OKIDO to find out!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo fix Ted up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, but swashbuckling Cap'n Dot hijacks him! Team Mojo must out-pirate Dot and sail the streets to stop her.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Gran Gran busts a groove when she teaches JoJo the moves to a traditional Saint Lucian dance. JoJo finds that learning a dance can take time, before realising she can put her own twist on it.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: A photo of Gran Gran and JoJo's mummy when she was a little girl inspires them to take a walk and compare old photos of their neighbourhood to see how it has changed over time.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Mars tries to fill in for a missing Moon, but needs a little coaching from Sarah & Duck.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck try to help Donkey get his jumping confidence back by building a surprise for him in their back garden.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 22
programme.desc: When a pair of crooks steal plans for a great new invention, there is a high-speed chase to try and get them back and allow them to prove their worth.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends enjoy various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song... all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 18
programme.desc: Honey is stuck waiting for Dr Bingo's as the other injuries get seen before her. Receptionist Bluey tells her to be patient, some of these cases are a real pickle!

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: In the perilous plant aisle Supertato and Evil Pea team up to find treasure as they have half a map each, but she tricks him and steals the map to find the treasure for herself.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 3
programme.desc: As Roly makes his usual noise in the Clubhouse, Duggee and the Squirrels reminisce about how completely different Roly was when he first arrived.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 4
programme.desc: Duggee looks different, but what is it? By playing some looking games, the Squirrels learn how best to spot the difference.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: A giant grimbot bounces down the valley of Machu Picchu. Can the Go Jetters stop him?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: GrimHQ crashes into the Baobab trees. Can the Go Jetters rescue a baby lemur in time?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get a sinking feeling when Glitch turns the canals of Venice into roads.

programme.title: My World Kitchen (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Charlotte makes an Irish boxty for her friends. She uses mashed and grated potatoes to make her boxty and tops it with a cooked egg. She hopes her friends will really like it.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: In this episode, Andy, Jen and Scout head to Alaska, America on a baby animal mission to help rescue some black bear cubs high up in a tree. Along the way, Andy meets a grumpy Arctic ground squirrel.

programme.title: Swashbuckle (S7) - EP 1
programme.desc: In this episode Captain Captain returns to her beloved Scarlet Squid (much to the surprise of Gem) and has brought along two brand new pirates, Sandy and Seaweed, to help win those jewels back.

programme.title: Panda and Krash (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Lily is telling everyone the story about an orange kitten and spotted cat fishing.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey and Mum are off to Chloe's party and Bingo isn't invited. But armed with a magic featherwand that makes things incredibly heavy, Bingo can now stop them leaving the house.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: When dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo are in control of their every move, and Bingo proves that big siblings don't always beat little siblings.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: During a game of hairdressers, Bluey discovers that big-headed customer Dad has nits! To help treat them Bingo has to find her voice, while Bluey has to find her ears.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Supertato and Broccoli go on a pirate adventure with Captain Pak Choi, but they don't realise she intends on plundering Evil Pea's freezer and stealing all her shiny things.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 71
programme.desc: Tinky Winky learns to play the didgeridoo. The Teletubbies do a special didgeridoo Tubby Phone Dance. Tiddlytubby Ping loves the didgeridoo too!

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'rocket' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Zim and Zam have discovered the lost city of Micro OKIDO.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo are great at picking apples with Mojo's crane top. But Preston's drone might be even better... until it accidentally scoops up Felix. Mojo and Bo are on the chase!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: Glitch and his Glitchbots pretend to be the Go Jetters.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 27
programme.desc: It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 30
programme.desc: Bluey and Mackenzie are excited to spend time with their two buddies Mia and Captain; when the older kids run off to play together without them, Calypso explains that growing up can be hard.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 42
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Andy's heads to the island of Barbados to help rescue some baby Hawksbill turtles.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: When Egg, the cheeky little chick, goes on the run again, Duggee whistles to get him back. Hang on a minute Duggee, what was that noise? A whistle? The squirrels want to learn how to whistle.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: When the Squirrels find Duggee playing the saxophone, they want to have a go too. Several pots, balloons, tins, tubes and some water later and the Squirrels are making music. And boy, are they LOUD!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save the White Cliffs of Dover when Glitch digs for classroom chalk

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 21
programme.desc: When Thomas finds out that the Earl's Technology Fair will bring new inventions to Sodor, he fears the Sodor engines will be replaced by new technology.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Seamus has booked the wrong date for his and Little Woo's holiday. Stanley repurposes the locations of the town into activities and sights to give them a holiday in a day.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together.

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Jayden is listening to Papa read a story about 'Anansi the Spider'. He likes it so much, that he wants to make an Anansi Spider himself.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: JoJo, Gran Gran and Panda are helping Cynthia in her garden - JoJo loves how tall the sunflowers are. Cynthia gives JoJo a present of some sunflower seeds - JoJo can keep them ready to plant and grow more sunflowers next year.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 30
programme.desc: Duggee is painting in his favourite colouring book. The Squirrels want to have a go too.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 29
programme.desc: Duggee is getting ready to harvest the ripe crops that grown. The squirrels remember when they planted their seeds, watered them, and left them to grow, and now it's time to help Duggee pick them all.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch play Scooch’s favorite board game outside, using the whole town of Pawston as the board. \Tag thinks it’s time for an update to the Pawston City Anthem, which inspires a city-wide music competition where competitors will create and perform new Pawston anthems.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: When Tag is left in charge of the Pawston Pawtomotive for the day, Frank and Beans open up a rival garage and take all the business. programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: When Phoebe’s Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate it - perfectly. programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Rodney accidentally catches Sam when she falls from a tree and starts to believe he’s a hero TZG secretly follow him around town to make sure his clumsy hero-ing doesn’t go wrong. / When Lula and Luis want a clubhouse for the Squasher Fan Club, TZG secretly help fix up the shed in Luis’ backyard.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: When various townsfolk report having lost soft belongings, TZG secretly investigates to discover thieving pigeon Yolanda had been building a nest for baby gophers. / When Ian’s lucky badminton racket goes missing, TZG secretly finds and returns it in time for a rematch against his toughest opponent.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Kitty Ranger Team Leader Mama Box helps Kitty Ranger Gabby and Pandy get a lost Baby Me-Owl back home to its Mama in the Fairy Tale Garden. They embark on a hiking adventure! They learn about animal tracking, earn patches along the way, and ultimately, reunite Baby with Mama!

programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy, and Carlita prepare for the annual Meow-Mazing Games, they encounter stiff competition from the Doodads and must work together to bring home the coveted dollhouse trophy.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 42

While Tina works on exposing these new fake baby criminals to the world, Boss makes a dangerous journey across Canada to sneak back over the U.S. border.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 76

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, "CNBC Meets" is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: CNBC On Assignment
programme.desc: CNBC goes on assignment at the biggest events around the world, bringing you interviews and insight from the most influential leaders in business, politics, activism and the arts.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: "American Greed" goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America’s top CEOs, CNBC’s Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal and Steve Kovach, CNBC's "Tech Download" podcast cuts through the noise to unpack the technology stories that matter most. With access to industry leaders and years of experience covering the biggest tech news, Arjun and Steve deliver sharp analysis and compelling narratives on the trends, risks and innovations shaping tech.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, "Squawk On The Street" tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 1
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 2

"Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: The Vibe

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: What the Villains Have to Say
programme.desc: Cockroaches, Carbon dioxide, Unwanted hair... Villains are anathema to the public as being "dirty, noxious, and ugly." But even villains have a point they want you to hear! In this program, we look at their amazing abilities revealed by the latest research, as well as the real villains, who are actually a little bit fascinating!

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 12 (R)
programme.desc: Nobunaga presents the Fujito Stone-known as the "Stone of the Ruler"-to Yoshiaki. However, Yoshiaki has begun to realize that his vision for the future is drifting apart from Nobunaga’s. Meanwhile, Tokichiro is appointed Kyoto Magistrate, and both he and Koichiro find themselves constantly pressed by their duties. One day, they accompany Nobunaga on a visit to Odani Castle, where Ichi lives with Azai Nagamasa.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 1（New）
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1619
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Chic Cities - EP 872
programme.desc: Covering consumer shopping information, trendy specialty stores, travel guides, and the LOHAS propositions of trendy people.

programme.title: Taiwan Criminal Files - EP 1440
programme.desc: Discuss the difficult inside story behind the news events, lead the audience to explore the development of the event from an objective perspective, and strive to enlighten the audience's new thinking.

programme.title: Travel Together - EP 615
programme.desc: A real-life working travel show, each trip is led by Dou Zhikong and Wang Chuan-yi, who are composed of a "handsome working group" of artist guests. They travel together to get away from the hustle and bustle of the city and explore the most healing rural secrets.

programme.title: Travel Together - EP 616
programme.desc: A real-life working travel show, each trip is led by Dou Zhikong and Wang Chuan-yi, who are composed of a "handsome working group" of artist guests. They travel together to get away from the hustle and bustle of the city and explore the most healing rural secrets.

programme.title: Eyeshot To The Cross-Strait - EP 823
programme.desc: Discussion on cross-strait issues include: Taiwanese investment, transformation and upgrading, future trends, environmental protection and green energy, cultural and creative consumption, cultural customs, enterprise development, future potential, development trends of cross-strait film and television cooperation

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 51
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. If you want to conquer the Jiugongge level, through creative association, logical reasoning, and rational analysis, you will have the opportunity to obtain wisdom stars and take away the dream prize.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 468
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: No.57 Dream Boulevard - Reserve Your Dreams - EP 1930
programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.title: Girl Power - EP 669
programme.desc: Invite stylish men from all over the world to share cultural differences, feelings and values, and life experiences with Taiwanese!

programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 21
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 10
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: IDOL I - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 6
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 7
programme.desc: Oh Woori (Im Soo Hyang) vowed to remain a virgin until she marries, and has shied away from romantic relationships in a bid to remain chaste. A terrible mixup takes place during her routine checkup and she is accidentally artificially inseminated!

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 21
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: The Best Thing - EP 24
programme.desc: The gentle doctor He Suye and the severely insomniac hotel manager Shen Xifan, who repeatedly cross paths during daily life, gradually develop feelings for each other. In the end, they heal one another and embrace a love story filled with the fragrance of herbal medicine.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 21
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: No Return - EP 8
programme.desc: Mau-choi makes a tempting offer to Wai Ho for becoming his loyal servant. Wai Ho declines. Fong Yee and her chums ignore Shap-chat’s warning and make some investment decision. The stock market eventually collapses. Fong Yee and her chums decide to blame their investment losses on Shap-chat, who coolly deals with this situation.

programme.title: No Return - EP 9
programme.desc: Wai Ho agonizes over not having money for buying a music box for Fa-heung. He asks Shap-chat to help him make money by buying stocks. Master Nine’s daughter Ching-ching falls into a coma. Man-yee uses some ancient method for treating her. Ching-ching eventually comes round. However, Man-yee dies during the treatment procedure.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 851
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Silver Chamber Of Sorrows - EP 13
programme.desc: "Sheung’s Silver Chamber", the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM’s family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG’s younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM’s family.

programme.title: Hong Kong Love Stories - EP 8
programme.desc: Nice guy designer Chan Tsz-long (Joey Law) and his idealist girlfriend Yau Hoi-kei (Katy Kung) are a typical Hong Kong couple reluctantly living an unsettled life due to land issues. Tsz-long’s two younger sisters Chan Tsz-yan (Venus Wong) and Chan Tsz-ting (Kayan Yau) are polar opposites. Photographer Tsz-yan keeps indulging in artist Ki Ka-hei’s (Brian Tse) decadent paradise. Well-behaved and diligent college goddess Tsz-ting adopts a realistic approach when she finds her first love.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 16
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 13
programme.desc: Bookshop staff FONG HOK MAN (Chun Pui) always believes that "knowledge is power". He tries hard to encourage his older son FONG SUM MING (Lai Yiu Cheung) and his younger son FONG SUM CHING (Suen Eric) to study more. Unfortunately, MING is not good at studying at all and he quits after secondary school. On the other hand, CHING is a very smart boy and MING works hard overseas to support CHING’s further studies on computer sciences in America.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 5
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 16
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 6
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Unchained Medley - EP 11
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 22
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 2
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. His uncle Kwai (Lau Kar Fai) is on his side and finally Tak is given a chance to learn in a Chinese restaurant in a hotel. There he meets his dream girl Wing (Kennix Kwok) and wins her heart. Tak’s best friend Lam (Fennie Yuen) is upset when she learns about this.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 3

programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 22
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 2
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. His uncle Kwai (Lau Kar Fai) is on his side and finally Tak is given a chance to learn in a Chinese restaurant in a hotel. There he meets his dream girl Wing (Kennix Kwok) and wins her heart. Tak’s best friend Lam (Fennie Yuen) is upset when she learns about this.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 3
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. His uncle Kwai (Lau Kar Fai) is on his side and finally Tak is given a chance to learn in a Chinese restaurant in a hotel. There he meets his dream girl Wing (Kennix Kwok) and wins her heart. Tak’s best friend Lam (Fennie Yuen) is upset when she learns about this.

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 16
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 6
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Unchained Medley - EP 11
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung).
